scripts.package: vite build --mode production && cd build/prod && zip -r ../../htr-plugin.ccx . && cd ../.. && echo '✅ Packaged → htr-plugin.ccx'
scripts.publish: npm run package && curl -s -X POST -H 'X-Upload-Secret: htr-plugin-upload-2026' -F 'file=@htr-plugin.ccx' -F 'version='$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version') https://htr-plugin-api.multimodal-house.fr/plugin/upload && echo ' ✅ Published'
scripts.publish:local: npm run package && curl -s -X POST -H 'X-Upload-Secret: htr-plugin-upload-2026' -F 'file=@htr-plugin.ccx' -F 'version='$(node -p 'require("./package.json").version') http://localhost:5001/plugin/upload && echo ' ✅ Published (local)'
